text.message: Ah okay, cooking too so missed some of the rolls
Make him pay a proper price please
Red you're too far ahead just play bro...
You've had like 15 cards a turn last few spins
I'm not close. Just trying to hold army from red...
I have 3 settles worth of production
Orange why are you crying about getting robbed, you have 5 VPs and 3 dev cards lol
Red gets army the game is over...
I need my cards to try and slow that
Now I need a card to pop...
That is bad... I need knights
And if you don't right block lol
Blue fanning the fire and is going to city up and take longest lmao
Blues not as much of a threat for now without ore tbh
When he cities yeh he good
Well I have 2 vp. You 2 none. Feels likely lol
Guess without a port it's a decision
Clearly I would've done it 100% so confirmed no mono here
Orange at 5 VPs and 4 devs saying gg red is actually comedic
I knew blue was gonna smoke us lmao
If you don't think all this thinking time is a mono... I can't help lol
What does it even matter if red has a mono?
Just made sense to try and slow blue tbh
Won't help them, but rooting for them
You're welcome I kept blue at 8 orange
Bruh, put it on the 8 wheat
I mean I'm all sheep fill your boots lol
Red do you have a knight
Blue has a card but all good
I knew red would move back on 8 wheat
I lose army now so take that into account green I'm cooked
They are not popping yet relax
Nothing like a road builder and a YOP in hand lol
GG orange, way to successfully cry yourself into a victory
I was just telling the truth ..
Yo I got that YOP on deck watch out
Bruh red did you truly not pull a knight lmao
Just wants the drama all good
Open build at 9 for that long must be painful
Yeh... Almost like I was telling the truth
Nah bro you had plenty of chances to win lol
It was the number of 7s and perfect blocks that sucked
Nah blue I told you I have a YOP
I did at end but if I hadn't had army red would've won years ago
I hope you all are having fun
